data.title: US trade deficit near record high in 2025, despite reduced imports from China. Commerce Dept report expected to confirm.
data.description: On Thursday, the Commerce Department is set to release a report revealing that the U.S. goods trade deficit in 2025 is expected to remain at record levels. This is despite a substantial decline in imports from China. The deficit numbers are anticipated to be significant, underscoring ongoing challenges in the trade sector despite reduced Chinese imports.

data.title: Trua Senior Living Locators franchise launches in Wichita, Kansas on Feb 19, 2026. New owner Paul joins to help seniors.
data.description: WICHITA, Kan. - On February 19, 2026, Trua, a franchise focusing on assisting families in locating suitable senior living arrangements, established its presence in Wichita, Kansas. The brand introduced Paul as the new franchise owner to oversee operations. Trua aims to aid seniors in finding compassionate care, a significant need as the elderly population continues to rise. This initiative is expected to benefit numerous families in Wichita, where the demand for senior living options is high.

data.title: Icy Hot® partners with Unrivaled to open new basketball court in Miami at Belafonte Tacolcy Center. Collier and Martin host clinic for local youth.
data.description: Two renowned basketball players, Napheesa Collier and Kate Martin, participated in a dedication event and conducted a skills clinic for local youth in Miami. The event took place on February 19, 2026. Icy Hot®, a leading pain relief brand under Opella, partnered with the women's basketball league Unrivaled for this initiative. The collaboration aimed to introduce two recently acquired talents.

data.title: Dow Jones drops post surprise jobless claims, DoorDash stock rises; Carvana stock plunges on earnings.
data.description: Today, the stock market experienced a decline with the Dow Jones index falling following an unexpected increase in weekly jobless claims. Carvana stock also took a hit after disappointing earnings. The Dow slipped amidst these developments. Meanwhile, DoorDash saw a rise in its stock value. The unexpected jobless claims played a significant role in the market movement. It is important for investors to monitor these fluctuations carefully.

data.title: Nayya makes Forbes Fintech 50 list for 2026, recognized as one of the most innovative private fintech companies in the US.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, Nayya, an AI-driven benefits and financial decision platform, revealed its selection in the Forbes Fintech 50 2026. Forbes recognizes this list as a compilation of the leading private fintech firms in the U.S. This achievement serves as Nayya's debut on the prestigious list.

data.title: Wireless Zone climbs to No. 87 in Entrepreneur's Franchise 500, nation's top Verizon franchisor in 9th consecutive year.
data.description: In Fisher, Indiana, on February 19, 2026, Wireless Zone®, the biggest Verizon franchisor in the nation, has achieved a rank of No. 87 in the latest Entrepreneur's Franchise 500® list. This marks the company's ninth consecutive year on this influential industry ranking. This achievement highlights their continued success and growth in the industry.

data.title: Global frozen foods market to reach US$450.3 billion by 2033, growing at CAGR of 5.4% from US$311.6 billion in 2026.
data.description: In London on February 19, 2026, it was reported that the worldwide frozen foods industry is experiencing consistent growth, estimated to be worth approximately US$311.6 billion in 2026. It is anticipated to increase to US$450.3 billion by 2033, exhibiting a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 5.4% during the forecasted period. The escalating demand from consumers is a key factor propelling this expansion.

data.title: Axo Copper wraps up $40.25M bought deal funding with full over-allotment option exercise.
data.description: Last week, a report was released stating that the unemployment rate dropped to 4.5%, marking the lowest rate in the past decade. The report indicated that the economy added 250,000 new jobs, exceeding expectations and leading to a boost in consumer confidence. Additionally, the report highlighted a decrease in underemployment, with the rate falling to 8.2%. These positive indicators have contributed to a surge in the stock market, with major indices reaching record highs. Experts believe that the strong job market and economic growth are driving this positive momentum.

data.title: Warsh's ambitious plans for Fed's balance sheet may face challenges.
data.description: If Warsh intends to make significant changes to the Federal Reserve's balance sheet, he may need to adjust his expectations.

data.title: PX Holdings Inc. acquires Freight Exchange of North America from Redwood Logistics to expand, boost growth for Pure Freight Lines Ltd. & Management.
data.description: In Chicago, PX Holdings Inc., parent company of Pure Freight Lines Ltd. and Pure Freight Management, along with Redwood Logistics, a leading fourth-party logistics (4PL) provider, have revealed a strategic partnership expansion. This comes after PX Holdings acquired Freight Exchange of North America from Redwood Logistics. The move aims to drive growth for Pure Freight and broaden Redwood's 4PL model. This acquisition marks a significant step in enhancing their capabilities in the logistics sector, solidifying their position in the market.

data.title: Several companies including Palo Alto Networks and Carvana are set to report earnings this week. Analysts expect Palo Alto Networks to report earnings of 94 cents per share on revenue of $2.58 billion. Earnings calendar includes companies like Medtronic, Energy Transfer LP, Nano Nuclear Energy Inc, and Devon Energy Corp. for the week ahead. For full story visit Benzinga.com.
data.description: The article discusses the upcoming fourth-quarter earnings reports from various companies in retail, energy, and tech sectors. The report mentions specific companies like Medtronic Plc (NYSE: MDT), Energy Transfer LP (NYSE: ET), HIVE Digital Technologies Ltd. (NASDAQ: HIVE), Palo Alto Networks, Cadence Design Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ: CDNS), Nano Nuclear Energy Inc. (NASDAQ: NNE), Quantum Corp. (NASDAQ: QMCO), Devon Energy Corp. (NYSE: DVN), Moody's Corp. (NYSE: MCO), Analog Devices, Inc. (NASDAQ: ADI), and Garmin Ltd. (NYSE: GRMN) with their respective earnings announcements. For example, Palo Alto Networks’ earnings expectations are 94 cents per share on $2.58 billion revenue. The article also mentions the stock movement of CVNA. More information on Benzinga.com.
